zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Weaver於1410年出生在英國英格蘭爾維亞福哈姆時，他的父親Sir Edward de Weaver30歲，母親Elizabeth de Booth29歲。他於1438年與Elizabeth Fitton在英國爾加福斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1468年在英國爾維亞福哈姆享年58歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Weaver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Weber
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Weaver was born in 1410, in Weaverham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edward de Weaver, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth de Booth, was 29. He married Elizabeth Fitton in 1438, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1468, in Weaverham, Cheshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Herefordshire, England.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Fitton en 1438, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1468, à Weaverham, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Herefordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Weaverが1410年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウエエイバーハムで生まれた時，父Sir Edward de Weaverは30歳，母Elizabeth de Boothは29歳であった。1438年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスでElizabeth Fittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1468年にイギリスチェシュアイアウエエイバーハムで58歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Weaver(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 위버함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward de Weaver(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Booth(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1438년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 Elizabeth Fitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 영국 체실르 위버함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Weaver родился в 1410 г. в местности вивирам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edward de Weaver было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Booth, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fitton в 1438 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1468 г. в местности вивирам, чешир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефордшир, Англия.
